minimize: SKIPPED — `fct minimize` reported the engine ALREADY matches FCP headless here (worst frame f1, PSNR 99 dB); the discrepancy is engine-vs-GUI, not engine-vs-FCP-headless. Oracle = the full GUI-GT gate, not a node-level repro.
scene: Image Mask on Transition B, Mask Source = a Replicator (14 cols x 8 rows = 112 tiles, grid size 1800x960 centered). Cell = a parametric Rectangle shape (extent 122.4px) referenced by the Replicator Cell (factoryID 18, cell Scale id=116 = 1.13). A 'Sequence opacity' behavior (Sequence Replicator, factoryID 16) staggers per-tile opacity across the grid; Shuffle Order (id=335)=1, Replicate Seed=node id. Transition A is the background drop zone.
bug1_seams: Replicator Cell Scale (id 116 = 1.13) read ONLY for factoryID 19; Squares' grid cell is factoryID 18 -> scale dropped -> tiles rasterize at bare 122.4px extent on 138.5px grid spacing -> orange grid-line lattice between tiles. FIX: resolve the cell by factory DESCRIPTION 'Replicator Cell' (fid 18 AND 19), expose id-116 as `cellScale` (tile-fill multiplier); Vertigo (has Scale-End 133 ramp) still routes id-116 to scaleStart -> byte-identical.
bug2_timing: Sequence Replicator 'End' default 0.1 -> front = progress/0.1 saturates by frame ~2 and the reveal FREEZES at ~0.49 B%. The behavior authors NO explicit End (sweeps the whole transition). FIX: default End = 1.0 when absent. Duplicate keeps explicit 0.8; 360_Divide unaffected.
rejected: Seeded-hash scatter order for Shuffle-Order=1: MEASURED 12.70 full-res < diagonal 12.97; a hash != Motion's exact PRNG, so it just moved the error. Kept the diagonal; documented in sequenceOrder for a future exact-PRNG decode.
repro_before_after: Full GUI-GT score: 12.46 -> 12.97 (full res) / 12.46 -> 13.11 (gate size). B% per frame goes from 'jump to 0.49 by f2 then flat' to 'linear 0->0.60 across all 24 frames' matching FCP.
